compiled_state.title: Implement gate-1b-feature-request-check.py
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
Create plugins/dso/scripts/gate-1b-feature-request-check.py. The script:
- Reads JSON stdin: {"title": "...", "description": "..."}
- Regex patterns for feature requests:
  - "doesn't support/accept/handle", "missing .* (capability|feature)", "no way to"
  - "can't .* yet", "unable to .* (new|any)"
- False-positive guards (regression indicators suppress triggering):
  - "anymore", "stopped working", "used to", "broke", "regression", "since v", "after update"
- Domain handle/support: NOT suppressed by simple lexical heuristics — regression indicators take precedence when present
- Emits gate signal JSON: gate_id "1b", signal_type "primary", triggered, evidence, confidence
- Exits 0 always. Python stdlib only (json, sys, re).

TDD: GREEN — implement until Task 1 tests pass.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Script exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x plugins/dso/scripts/gate-1b-feature-request-check.py
- [ ] All RED tests pass
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && python -m pytest tests/scripts/test_gate_1b_feature_request_check.py -q
- [ ] Detects feature-request language
  Verify: echo '{"title":"Missing OAuth support","description":""}' | python3 plugins/dso/scripts/gate-1b-feature-request-check.py | python3 -c "import json,sys; assert json.load(sys.stdin)['triggered']==True"
- [ ] Passes genuine bugs
  Verify: echo '{"title":"App crashes on save","description":""}' | python3 plugins/dso/scripts/gate-1b-feature-request-check.py | python3 -c "import json,sys; assert json.load(sys.stdin)['triggered']==False"
- [ ] ruff check
  Verify: ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/gate-1b-feature-request-check.py
